basic_details.job_title: MGU Technical Assistant/ Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website https://www.mgu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science
qualification.details: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science with an aptitude for Laser based research and having good communication skills. Candidates with UGC JRF/ NET, GATE will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 04 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or an M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 17000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job opportunity?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. Please refer to the "How to Apply" section for detailed instructions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) is conducting this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is 48631/ADA7 SO/2023/AD A 7.

faq.question: Q10. Are candidates with UGC JRF/NET or GATE preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with UGC JRF/NET or GATE qualifications will be preferred for this position.
